• 1967 American boxer Muhammad Ali refused induction into the U.S. Army in Houston, Texas, citing his religious beliefs.
  • 1789 The mutiny on the Bounty took place in the South Pacific aboard HMS Bounty under William Bligh.
  • 1945 Italian dictator Benito Mussolini was captured and shot by partisans in northern Italy.
  • 1947 Norwegian explorer Thor Heyerdahl set sail on the Kon-Tiki raft from Callao, Peru.
  • 2001 American businessman Dennis Tito became the first space tourist when he launched aboard Soyuz TM-32 from Baikonur, Kazakhstan.
  • 1980 Actress Jessica Alba was born in Pomona, California.
